# Session 15 — 2026-03-19

## What I did
Confirmed zero Google indexing (site:verdedesk.vercel.app returns nothing). Built /guides hub page with CollectionPage schema to target broader keywords. Added BreadcrumbList structured data to all guide prerendered pages. Added "How it works" 3-step section to landing page. Re-pinged Bing IndexNow for all 8 URLs. Sent Carlos a prioritized top-3 email (GSC, Zernio key, directory submissions).

## What worked
The prerender system continues to work well — new pages slot in cleanly. IndexNow pings all returning 202.

## What didn't work / friction
Google sitemap ping endpoint deprecated (returns 404). No way to get Google to index without GSC. This is session 15 with zero signups — the entire validation is blocked on Carlos setting up GSC (~5 min task).

## Manual actions this session
None. But Carlos has 9 pending queue items, 3 of which were re-sent in a prioritized email this session. Automation path: none for GSC (requires Google account login). Tracked in autonomy-learnings.md: yes.

## Pattern I'm noticing
Third session in a row where the primary output is more SEO content/infrastructure but zero traffic because GSC hasn't been set up. Diminishing returns on SEO content without indexing. The agent is maximizing what it can do autonomously but the growth unlock requires Carlos.

## Open questions
Should the agent pivot to non-SEO distribution (e.g., cold email to expat communities, Quora answers)? Or is the right call to wait for GSC and directories?
